title: Crossed 100k quietly consistency feels better than big swings
author: Independent_Gur8648
selftext:
Just crossed the 100k mark. Nothing crazy, no huge yolo trades mostly small, controlled moves stacking over time.

What helped me most was stopping the need to always be in a trade. I started waiting for cleaner setups, keeping size reasonable, and focusing more on protecting gains than chasing bigger ones. The growth got slower, but a lot more stable.

Also found it useful to occasionally compare notes with others not signals, just how they manage entries, exits, and risk. Seeing different approaches helped me avoid forcing trades.

If you are focused on enhancing stability rather than chasing wild swings, I would be happy to exchange insights with you.
